ChangeRequest.name: [Asset Sec] New entities: Interest rate swap and Currency rate swap
ChangeRequest.comment:
<!-- See: documentation on [Issues in GitLab](https://gitlab.sofa.dev/sdd-bird-team/bird-logical-data-model/-/wikis/Issues-in-GitLab) -->
# Overview C 14.01 requires the reporting of memorandum items Interest rate swaps (IRS) and Currency rate swaps (CRS). I could not find these entities in LDM. They need to be defined with relevant amounts and relationships to: 1) underlying exposures such as loans 2) tranches 3) securitisation directly
These may also be considered as a securitisation position depending on the structure of the securitisation. IRS can be used for example to convert loans'fixed rate into ABS floating rate. Note that in terms of capital treatment under SEC-ERBA, they should inherit the rating of the position they are relating to (art 263). This is called inferred rating.
### Contact person olivia.hauet@ecb.europa.eu arjan.bos@ecb.europa.eu
### Business definition _[Business requirements]_
### Legal definition ITS <dl><dt>IRS</dt><dd>IRS stands for Interest Rate Swaps</dd> <dt>CRS</dt><dd> whereas CRS stands for Currency Rate Swaps.</dd></dl> Those derivatives are listed in Annex II to the of Regulation (EU) No 575/2013.
### Reason for inclusion Indispensable for capital requirements calculations
### Relationships 1) underlying exposures such as loans 2) tranches 3) securitisation directly
### Relevant Framework/Template C 13.01 if they are considered as a securitisation position C 14.01 | IRS / CRS | |-----------| | 0380 |
### Additional documentation/links (optional) _[Additional info]_
### Before closing checklist - [ ] Assignee for review - [ ] Assignee to close - [ ] Other actions
